title: Your 12-Week Ramp
intro: Lessons first, then fit, then buy, then post scores. Tick items as you go — progress saves to disk with the rest of your app. Built from your coaching session on 2026-07-06.

weeks.label: This week
weeks.focus: Book coaching + register for a handicap

tasks.text: Call TSG @ Clover Greens and book the Adult Game Improvement Program
tasks.detail: +91 96866 06223 (Gagan) / +91 89040 82386 · reach_us@tsgolf.in. Ask for the 10 × 60-min package price, weekday afternoon slots, confirm coaching runs at the Hosur site, and whether you can borrow range clubs.

tasks.text: Register with IGU WHS as a Non-Club Member
tasks.detail: whs.indiangolfunion.org — ₹2,500/yr (+GST ≈ ₹3,100). Official India handicap, no club membership needed.

tasks.text: Pencil a Clubworks fitting slot for ~3 weeks out
tasks.detail: Don't fit yet — your strike is too inconsistent to read on a launch monitor. Fit after a few lessons.

weeks.label: Weeks 1–2
weeks.focus: Build fundamentals on the set you already own

tasks.text: Take 2–3 lessons on your Decathlon set (or range clubs)
tasks.detail: Tell the coach: 'I mishit more than I strike clean — fix my fundamentals first.' Most beginner mishits trace to grip, setup/posture, or swinging too hard.
Waist-high to waist-high, clean contact, then lengthen. Slow tempo ('one-and-two'), aim at a target every ball. 40 focused balls beats 120 rushed ones.

tasks.text: Do NOT touch the driver yet
tasks.detail: It magnifies every flaw. Earn it after your iron strike settles.

weeks.label: Weeks 3–4
weeks.focus: Get fitted, then buy the set

tasks.text: Attend the Clubworks fitting once your strike settles
tasks.detail: Ask for a lie-angle check, a gapping check PW→56°, and flex confirmation on the launch monitor. Say: 'I want a Callaway game-improvement set, Regular flex.'
See the gear list below. Go pre-owned on driver + putter; new irons via GolfEdge against your spec sheet.
Callaway cart bag + headcovers, glove, Supersoft balls, pitch tool + ball marker, 2 collared polos. You already have UA shoes + pants.
Sell or donate it — don't mix a starter set into your new bag.

tasks.text: Play 3 rounds per 2 weeks at Clover Greens
tasks.detail: Learn one course deeply. Tee off by 1:00–1:15 PM in winter to beat sunset.

tasks.text: Post every score to the IGU WHS portal, same day
tasks.detail: Card signed by a playing partner. Net double bogey is your max on any hole — pick up and keep pace.
₹1,500–2,500/session. Coached 110-shooters reach low 90s in a year; self-taught ones plateau at 100.

tasks.text: Reach 54 holes posted → your Handicap Index arrives
tasks.detail: This is the milestone that makes you a real, ranked amateur.

tasks.text: Book a 9-hole on-course lesson with TSG
tasks.detail: Fastest respectability gain there is — a pro walking the course with you, not the range.

tasks.text: Start tracking fairways / GIR / putts per round
tasks.detail: This is how you find the 3–4 shots you're leaking and where to practise next.

gear.title: The all-Callaway set (≈ ₹88k)
gear.note: Pre-owned unless marked. Regular flex, game-improvement throughout. Odyssey is Callaway-owned, so the whole bag reads as one composed family.

items.pick: Callaway Rogue ST Max (one gen old)
Callaway Paradym X or Rogue ST Max

contacts.name: Clubworks (fitting + pre-owned)
contacts.value: Book a launch-monitor fitting; fee often waived on purchase

contacts.name: GolfEdge India (new clubs, online)
contacts.value: golfedgeindia.com — buy against your fitting spec sheet
